chat.title: Chat
chat.welcomeSubtitle: Control your smart home using natural language.
chat.suggestion1: Turn on the living room light
chat.errorMessage: An error occurred while sending the message.
chat.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear this conversation? This will delete all messages on the server.
chat.deleteError: Failed to clear the conversation history.
chat.noLlmInterpreterText: The chat feature requires a Large Language Model (LLM)-based Human Language Interpreter to function.
chat.noLlmInterpreterHint: You can install the Gemini binding from the add-on store to get started. Make sure to read its documentation. Support for more LLM providers will be added in the future.
